chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-195 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. for hearing of main case. 24.10.2025 Mr. Afzal Kareem Virk advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Shahroz Ali Mahar advocate for the applicant. Mr. Malik Sohail Ahmed Awan advocate for the respondent No.3. Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Mari, Assistant PG a/w DSP Muhammad Aslam Jagirani. = Per record, applicant Dr. Ghulam Mujtaba lodged F.I.R on behalf of State at P.S Satellite Town Mirpurkhas for offence under sections 120-B, 420, 478 PPC, 4,5 Agriculture Pesticide and 3 and 4 of Sindh Fertilizer Control Act. After usual investigation, I.O has recommended the case for disposal in cancelled “C” class and such summary has been approved by learned Magistrate vide order dated 10-12-2024. Being aggrieved, the applicant/ complainant preferred instant Criminal Misc. Application with prayer to set aside the impugned order passed by learned Magistrate. During pendency of this application, this court issued direction to the S.S.P, Mirpurkhas, for re-investigation of the case through an honest and competent officer. The S.S.P, Mirpurkhas has assigned re- investigation to DSP Muhammad Aslam Jagirani. Today DSP Muhammad Aslam Jagirani is present and has filed application / statement alongwith order dated 23-09-2025 of SSP Mirpurkhas for re-investigation of the case in Crime No.155/ 2024. He submitted that on the instruction of the S.S.P Mirpurkhas he has initiated re-investigation of the above case/crime and after completing investigation he will submit such report before the concerned Magistrate.

Today DSP Muhammad Aslam Jagirani is present and has filed application / statement alongwith order dated 23-09-2025 of SSP Mirpurkhas for re-investigation of the case in Crime No.155/ 2024. He submitted that on the instruction of the S.S.P Mirpurkhas he has initiated re-investigation of the above case/crime and after completing investigation he will submit such report before the concerned Magistrate. Mr. Afzal Kareem Virk advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Shahroz Ali Mahar advocate for the applicant, recorded his no objection as matter is already under investigation. Learned counsel for the respondent and learned A.P.G have recorded no objection for re-investigation of the case. In view of above, instant Criminal Miscellaneous application is disposed of with direction to present I.O to conduct impartial investigation in the matter and submit such report before the cornered Magistrate. Learned Magistrate may pass order on the report in accordance with law. JUDGE *Saleem*
